headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Expand Energy, Lowers Price Target to $139
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Devin McDermott   maintains Expand Energy (NASDAQ:EXE) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $141 to $139.
